feature.name: InputEvent types for deletion commands on non-collapsed selections
feature.creator: pranavmodi@microsoft.com
feature.summary: Reports accurate inputType values for deletion keyboard shortcuts on selected text. When deletion commands like Ctrl+Backspace or Ctrl+Delete are used with selected text in contenteditable elements, the beforeinput and input events now report deleteContentBackward or deleteContentForward instead of deleteWordBackward or deleteWordForward. This enables web developers to correctly understand what editing operation occurred and implement reliable undo/redo or custom editing behaviors.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2025-12-19 by pranavmodi@microsoft.com). Reports accurate inputType values for deletion keyboard shortcuts on selected text. When deletion commands like Ctrl+Backspace or Ctrl+Delete are used with selected text in contenteditable elements, the beforeinput and input events now report deleteContentBackward or deleteContentForward instead of deleteWordBackward or deleteWordForward. This enables web developers to correctly understand what editing operation occurred and implement reliable undo/redo or custom editing behaviors. Category: Miscellaneous. Blink component: Blink>Editing>InputEvent. Stars: 87.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.
